custom_css: aside .btn-pulse{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00a859,#fbdf07) !important;color:#000 !important;border-radius:12px !important;font-weight:900 !important;text-transform:uppercase !important;font-style:italic !important;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,168,89,0.4) !important;border:2px solid #fff !important}.title-3d{font-weight:900 !important;font-style:italic !important;text-transform:uppercase !important;color:#fff !important;text-shadow:0 1px 0 #0056b3,0 2px 0 #004494,0 3px 0 #003375,0 4px 0 #002256,0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5) !important}#streak-input{background-color:#111 !important;border:1px solid #fbdf07 !important;border-radius:12px !important;color:#fff !important}.item-card{background-color:#f0fdf4 !important;border-radius:12px !important;border:2px solid transparent !important}.item-card.selected-card{border-color:#00a859 !important;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,168,89,0.5) !important}.tab-btn{font-weight:800 !important;text-transform:uppercase !important;color:#666 !important}.tab-btn.active{color:#00a859 !important}.tab-btn.active::after{background-color:#fbdf07 !important;height:4px !important;border-radius:2px !important}#streak-count{text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,255,255,0.2) !important}
